---
title: "Simulation 1"
draft: true
draft_mode: unlinked
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(moderndive)
data <- read_csv("gyro.csv") |>
    janitor::clean_names()

data |> 
    head() |> 
    knitr::kable()
```

```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x=time_s, y=absolute_rad_s)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_smooth(method="lm", se=FALSE)
```

```{r}
mean_acc <- data |> 
    select(absolute_rad_s) |> 
    summarise(mean_acc=mean(absolute_rad_s)) |> 
    pull()

prec <- 0.0012
data |> 
    select(absolute_rad_s) |>
    filter(absolute_rad_s < mean_acc + prec & absolute_rad_s > mean_acc - prec)
```
